news.headline: National Association of Water Companies celebrates 130 years by ringing NYSE bell to honor safe, reliable water access.
news.summary: In New York, NAWC will mark its 130th anniversary by ringing the opening bell at the NYSE. The event celebrates the organization's dedication to providing safe and dependable water and wastewater services.

news.headline: EVPassport and CBRE partner to install 3,600 EV chargers at 600 sites in the US for multifamily and hospitality properties.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, EVPassport and CBRE have joined forces to offer EV charging solutions for multifamily and hospitality properties in North America. Through this agreement, CBRE will assist in installing 3,600 EV chargers at 600 sites in the US. This partnership aims to benefit property owners and operators by facilitating the transition to electric vehicles.

news.headline: USIC has been named one of America's Best Large Employers in Forbes' 2025 list, based on survey of over 217,000 employees.
news.summary: USIC, LLC, a leading underground utility damage prevention company based in Indianapolis, has recently been recognized as one of America's Best Large Employers in Forbes' 2025 list. Published on February 12, 2025, the list features top employers based on an independent survey conducted in partnership with Statista. With over 217,000 employees in the U.S., USIC’s inclusion on this prestigious list highlights its commitment to providing a positive work environment. For more details, the list can be accessed on Forbes website.

news.headline: Pioneer Power renews $2 million on-site power service agreement with U.S. retailer for 3 years.
news.summary: An industry leader in distributed energy resources and power generation equipment, Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) renewed and extended a service agreement with a major U.S. retailer. The new three-year deal solidifies their commitment to providing on-site power services to the retailer. Pioneer is known for its expertise in manufacturing, servicing, and integrating energy solutions, including mobile electric vehicle charging setups. This agreement underscores the Company’s dedication to delivering reliable energy services to its clients.

news.headline: AWE Gaming Hub launched in Long Beach to boost XR gaming with resources & support for studios, developers.
news.summary: Long Beach, California - On February 13, 2025, AWE revealed the launch of the AWE Gaming Hub, a groundbreaking initiative aimed at advancing XR gaming into the mainstream. This project provides new resources for studios, creators, developers, publishers, and others involved in the gaming industry. The AWE Gaming Hub is set to boost the XR gaming sector and drive innovation.

news.headline: Atera appoints Avi Israel as CFO to drive growth in the IT industry. Israel has 15+ years experience.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Atera, the innovative Agentic AI IT management platform, revealed the selection of Avi Israel as their new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Avi boasts more than 15 years of expertise in constructing, overseeing, and guiding finance functions.

news.headline: Leonard Bernstein, MD is new medical director at LSSCNY. Roy Geronemus, MD to depart after 31 years. New Clinical Advisory Board formed.
news.summary: In a significant development in the medical field, Dr. Leonard Bernstein has been appointed as the medical director of the Laser & Skin Surgery Center of New York, marking a new chapter for the renowned institution. Additionally, the LSSCNY has established a Clinical Advisory Board to further enhance its services and offerings. It has been disclosed that Dr. Roy Geronemus, a key figure at LSSCNY, will be stepping down after an impressive 31-year tenure. The changes come as NavaDerm Partners, LLC takes the helm in this transition period. The announcement, made on February 13, 2025, signifies a strategic move for the organization, paving the way for continued success and growth in the industry.

news.headline: Room Cougar is the first video-based hotel review platform, revolutionizing accommodation bookings with user-generated reviews and compensating users for sharing experiences. (Words: 26)
news.summary: A new platform is revolutionizing the way travelers book accommodations by providing them with genuine user-generated reviews. This initiative aims to democratize the booking process and enhance transparency for travelers. Additionally, users are incentivized with compensation for sharing their authentic experiences. This innovative approach in the travel industry is set to change the game for consumers. The platform's launch in Miami on February 13, 2025, has already garnered significant attention. Travelers now have access to a wide array of hotel rooms and can make more informed decisions thanks to this groundbreaking platform.

news.headline: enQase, a new quantum-safe security solution, launched in Austin, Texas on Feb. 13, 2025 to protect sensitive information.
news.summary: enQase, a cutting-edge quantum-safe security solution, has been introduced in Austin, Texas on February 13, 2025. The aim is to protect highly sensitive data from quantum attacks. This advanced solution meets the growing demands of businesses for enhanced security measures.

news.headline: JFOODO partners with NYC restaurants to promote Buri and Japanese Scallops, aiming to showcase their unique flavors.
news.summary: A popular international culinary destination is teaming up with multiple restaurants in New York City to showcase the flavors and excellence of Buri and Japanese Scallops. Recently, JFOODO, also known as The Japan Food Product Overseas Promotion Center, unveiled a fresh initiative to highlight the unique attributes of these seafood options. This partnership will bring attention to the quality and taste of Buri and Japanese Scallops in various eateries across the city.

news.headline: Oobli partners with Ingredion amid high demand for sweet proteins, secures $18M funding round with key investors.
news.summary: Today, Oobli unveiled a new partnership with Ingredion Ventures, Lever VC, and Sucden Ventures, as they join previous key investors to complete a funding round amounting to $18 million. This announcement comes as Oobli, headquartered in Davis, California, marks a significant milestone by becoming the inaugural company globally to develop a successful sweet protein platform. The partnership holds immense promise for the future development and growth of Oobli, with the backing of key industry investors.

news.headline: Good Day Farm opens new medical cannabis dispensary in Little Rock at 3600 Cantrell Road, spanning 3,456 sq. ft.
news.summary: A new dispensary by Good Day Farm has opened its doors in Little Rock, Arkansas on Feb. 13, 2025. The location at 3600 Cantrell Road in the Allsopp Park neighborhood spans 3,456 square feet. This store offers patients...

news.headline: Reveleer to showcase AI impact on value-based care at ViVE 2025, aiming for growth. GLENDALE, Calif., Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: A top value-based care platform is advancing confidently into 2025 with robust momentum and future expansion strategies. Based in Glendale, California, Reveleer, renowned as the premier value-based care enablement platform, is set to showcase its AI-driven intelligent automation solutions at ViVE. This move signifies the company's dedication to innovation and its commitment to staying ahead of the curve. The demonstration will highlight Reveleer's cutting-edge technology, illustrating how it streamlines processes and enhances efficiency. This announcement comes amidst a period of exceptional growth for the platform, suggesting a promising outlook for the company.

news.headline: Kinder Joy® and Kinder® Chocolate collaborate with DC and Funko for 16 new limited-edition collections of toys and trading cards. Celebrating DC's iconic characters.
news.summary: Ferrero North America's popular chocolate brands, Kinder Joy® and Kinder® Chocolate, have introduced a collection of 16 new Funko toys and trading cards inspired by beloved DC characters such as Batman, Superman, and The Joker. The launch took place in Parsippany, N.J. on February 13, 2025. The collaboration with DC aims to honor the legacy of creating iconic characters.

news.headline: Subtle Medical's SubtleHD™ receives FDA clearance, introduces Subtle-ELITE™ for superior image quality and speed in MRI.
news.summary: Subtle Medical has introduced Subtle-ELITE™ following FDA approval of SubtleHD™, marking a breakthrough in the industry. The AI package aims to deliver exceptional image quality, unmatched speed, and streamline workflow processes. Based in Menlo Park, the company launched this cutting-edge technology on February 13, 2025. Subtle Medical is renowned worldwide for its AI-driven solutions.

news.headline: Reservations now available for 1 Hotel Seattle, a sustainable sanctuary in heart of Seattle. Luxury experience by 1 Hotels brand.
news.summary: Indulge in eco-friendly luxury and immerse yourself in the breathtaking scenery of the Pacific Northwest at the center of Seattle. On February 13, 2025, 1 Hotels, a renowned luxury hotel brand inspired by nature and established by hospitality expert Barry Sternlicht, excitedly disclosed that reservations...

news.headline: CereVasc approved for STRIDE trial in Argentina for elderly with NPH; aiming to enroll patients.
news.summary: CereVasc, a clinical-stage medical device company focusing on innovative treatments for neurological conditions, has commenced enrollment for the STRIDE trial in Argentina following approval from ANMAT. As of February 13, 2025, this trial aims to evaluate the efficacy of their novel treatments. The company has not disclosed specifics about the number of participants or duration of the trial. This development marks a significant step forward in their mission to advance healthcare solutions.

news.headline: EDCO Products launches Perspectives™, a premium steel architectural building solution, expanding creative possibilities in modern architecture.
news.summary: In Hopkins, Minnesota on February 13, 2025, EDCO Products, a prominent player in groundbreaking construction materials, unveiled Perspectives™, a high-end steel architectural building solution. This innovative product is designed to enhance creative options in modern architecture.

news.headline: Eudia receives $105M in Series A funding from General Catalyst to revolutionize legal work with AI.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, on February 13, 2025, Eudia unveiled its innovative Augmented Intelligence platform catered towards Fortune 500 legal teams. The company confirmed the completion of its Series A funding round, securing a maximum of $105 million. General Catalyst spearheaded the investment with contributions from Floodgate and Sierra Ventures.

news.headline: Comtech launches industry-first Multipath Radio platform for high data rate over-the-horizon communication. #CMTL #5G
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, on February 13, 2025, Comtech Telecommunications Corp. (NASDAQ: CMTL) unveiled its latest innovation - the multipath radio ("MPR") platform. This groundbreaking technology marks the debut of the terrestrial high data rate over-the-horizon integrated radio. With the MPR platform, first responders, warfighters, and commercial operators will benefit from enhanced high data rate communications on a singular antenna, revolutionizing their capabilities.

news.headline: Bloom Energy and Chart Industries partner for carbon capture with natural gas and fuel cells to offer zero-carbon power sol.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE) and Chart Industries, Inc. (NYSE: GTLS) to provide near zero-carbon power solutions. This collaboration, announced in San Jose, California, will utilize natural gas and fuel cells for electricity generation. Bloom Energy is recognized globally for fuel cell technology, while Chart Industries is a leader in energy and industrial gas solutions. The aim of this partnership is to cater to customers such as data centers and manufacturers who require always-on power. This innovative venture will contribute to reducing carbon emissions and provide sustainable energy options to various industries.

news.headline: Uscreen secures $150M investment from PSG to boost growth in creator economy. PSG aims to enhance its positioning.
news.summary: In Washington, Uscreen, a platform for video monetization in the creator economy, revealed a significant $150 million investment from PSG, a growth equity firm focusing on partnerships with software and technology firms to drive growth. The investment is aimed at solidifying Uscreen's dominant role in shaping the future of the creator economy by integrating content, community, and experiences.

news.headline: Innovaccer enhances integration with athenahealth, improving data access and speeding up value realization for joint customers.
news.summary: In a press release today, Innovaccer Inc. revealed advancements in its integration with athenahealth via the Marketplace program. This enhancement aims to facilitate access to key analytics for shared clients, optimizing clinical processes and expediting value delivery. Through the integration, Innovaccer now offers improved connectivity with athenahealth’s Data View solution and EHR write-back feature. This enables healthcare entities to seamlessly retrieve clinical, financial, and scheduling data, ultimately minimizing administrative burdens.

news.headline: American Express Global Business Travel will report Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025.
news.summary: An announcement made in New York reveals that American Express Global Business Travel will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2024 on February 27, 2025. This update is eagerly awaited by investors and stakeholders interested in the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Sprout Social introduces rebranded Influencer Marketing platform to enhance partnerships and scalability for brands.
news.summary: Sprout Social has introduced a new Influencer Marketing platform that is changing the way brands find, engage, and expand influencer collaborations. This innovative tool is streamlining the process for brands by providing advanced features to manage and measure influencer partnerships. With a user-friendly interface and robust analytics capabilities, the platform offers brands the ability to reach a wider audience and drive more impactful campaigns. This engagement-focused solution is enhancing the effectiveness of influencer marketing strategies, resulting in increased reach and improved ROI for brands.

news.headline: Nintendo releases Tomb Raider IV-VI Remastered on Nintendo Switch, featuring classic games. Uncover Lara Croft's past.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, this week's Nintendo Download offers players new content for Nintendo Switch. Gamers can now access Tomb Raider IV-VI Remastered on the Nintendo eShop, including classic titles such as Tomb Raider: The Last Revelation, Tomb Raider: Chronicles, and Tomb Raider: The Angel of Darkness. This remastered collection allows players to traverse the world, unravel Lara Croft's backstory, and explore the mystery of her vanishing. Players can choose to experience each game with the original polygonal models or opt for updated graphics.

news.headline: AdventHealth partners with ParkourSC for AI supply chain solutions, enhancing efficiency.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, ParkourSC disclosed that AdventHealth, a healthcare system prioritizing holistic health, will utilize ParkourSC's AI-based supply chain decision platform. By incorporating the intelligent Inventory Control Tower, AdventHealth aims to improve its supply chain efficiency. This move will enable AdventHealth to guarantee the availability of essential medical resources in a timely manner.

news.headline: BlackFog launches anti data exfiltration solution for macOS to combat ransomware; expands protection to macOS Ventura.
news.summary: In San Francisco, BlackFog, a premier provider of ransomware prevention and anti data exfiltration solutions, introduced their latest cybersecurity protection platform for macOS. This launch signifies an expansion of their already strong protection suite for Windows, Android, and ChromeOS platforms. The new macOS version extends comprehensive threat protection to all Apple devices operating on macOS Ventura or newer. In today's digital landscape, the rise of ransomware and AI-driven attacks presents a significant challenge for organizations. BlackFog's advanced platform aims to address these threats effectively.

news.headline: Tilson and Sitetracker mark 10 years of collaboration in infrastructure delivery, including GIS Link integration.
news.summary: In Montclair, NJ, Tilson, a prominent figure in network development and information infrastructure services, and Sitetracker, a leading asset lifecycle management platform, have celebrated a decade of successful collaboration in delivering large-scale infrastructure projects. A significant achievement in this partnership has been the incorporation of GIS Link, bolstering Tilson's project management capabilities across its diverse service offerings. This integration has streamlined operations and enhanced efficiency in managing complex projects.

news.headline: Swap partners with Signifyd to create secure cross-border platform for e-commerce brands. Collaboration aims to empower merchants to scale internationally with confidence.
news.summary: In London, Exchange, an e-commerce operating system (OS) streamlining global operations for e-commerce brands, has unveiled a new partnership with Signifyd, a prominent player in fraud prevention. This collaboration aims to provide a highly secure cross-border platform. Through combining Signifyd’s Commerce Protection Platform with Swap Global, merchants can expand globally with assurance. This partnership will facilitate a clearer and more predictable process, bolstering international scaling opportunities for businesses.

news.headline: Syndigo awards 2024 Partner of the Year recipients in NA and Europe for excellence in growth strategies.
news.summary: Syndigo, a prominent provider of Product Experience Management (PXM) solutions worldwide, has revealed the winners of the 2024 Partner of the Year Awards. These prestigious awards acknowledge the outstanding performance of North American and European partners in utilizing Syndigo's solutions to drive growth via enhanced data management and implementation. Dominic Citino, Syndigo's Senior Vice President - A, expressed gratitude towards all partners for their valuable contributions to supporting customers in advancing their digital transformations.

news.headline: Credo Financial Results Call on March 4, 2025 at 2:00 PM Pacific Time for Q3 earnings ended Feb 1, 2025.
news.summary: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (Nasdaq: CRDO) based in San Jose, California, a leader in secure, high-speed connectivity solutions for enhanced reliability and energy efficiency, disclosed plans for a conference call on March 4, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time. The call aims to review financial performance for the fiscal third quarter concluding on February 1, 2025. Details on the Q3 FY 2025 results will be publicized during the call.

news.headline: PurpleLab® and Payerset team up to provide healthcare decision-makers with trusted price & coverage intelligence, revolutionizing the industry.
news.summary: In Wayne, Pennsylvania, PurpleLab®, a prominent health tech firm focusing on real-world data and medical claims insights, has partnered with Payerset, a top enterprise providing price transparency data. Their collaboration aims to introduce a cutting-edge price intelligence solution suite in the healthcare sector. This strategic alliance sets a new benchmark in healthcare intelligence, offering healthcare organizations highly precise and actionable insights to make smarter, data-driven decisions. This partnership is set to revolutionize the industry with its unmatched accuracy and potential impact.

news.headline: GK Software named leader in 2025 IDC MarketScape for POS software in retail fuel and convenience industry.
news.summary: A recent report by IDC MarketScape has identified GK Software as a Leader in the Worldwide Point-of-Sale (POS) Software Platform Vendors in Retail Fuel and Convenience sector for 2025 (doc #US51800224, February 2025). This recognition underscores GK Software's dedication to providing innovative solutions tailored to the changing requirements of fuel and convenience retailers. The report assesses the strategic initiatives and competencies of POS providers, positioning GK Software as a prominent player in the industry.

news.headline: Tractor Supply Company raises dividend by 4.5% to $0.92 per share/year for fiscal year 2025, declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share.
news.summary: Tractor Supply Company, the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the U.S., headquartered in Brentwood, Tennessee, has recently raised its dividend by $0.04, marking a 4.5% year-over-year increase, totaling $0.92 per share annually for fiscal year 2025. The Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per common stock share. This development exemplifies the company's commitment to rewarding its shareholders while bolstering its financial standing.

news.headline: Fabletics partners with Blue Yonder for supply chain planning, including demand planning and expansion. Plantensive will support the transformation.
news.summary: Fabletics, a leading active and lifestyle wear brand, has partnered with Blue Yonder to implement their SaaS-based Supply Chain Planning solutions. This collaboration includes utilizing Blue Yonder's tools for demand planning, allocation & replenishment, merchandise financial planning, and size scaling. The aim is to enhance Fabletics' global presence. The implementation will be facilitated by Plantensive, a partner of Blue Yonder. This strategic move is part of Fabletics' efforts to expand its reach and optimize its supply chain operations.

news.headline: Tech company Future partners with OpenAxes for joint initiative, set to revolutionize industry. #technology #partnership
news.summary: In a recent study, it was found that approximately 30% of adults in the United States have received at least one dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. This equates to around 97 million individuals. The study also revealed that over 17% of the population is fully vaccinated, which amounts to more than 56 million people. These numbers indicate significant progress in the nationwide vaccination efforts to combat the ongoing pandemic.

news.headline: Prenuvo raises $120M for preventative health, unveils FDA-cleared AI products. 1.4M health insights, 110K members.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, Prenuvo, a prominent proactive whole-body MRI screening company, has revealed its successful $120 million funding in the Series B round in 2024. This substantial achievement solidifies its position as a front-runner in preventive healthcare. With a membership base exceeding 110,000, Prenuvo has discovered more than 1.4 million individualized health findings, emphasizing the importance of early detection. Additionally, the company received FDA approval for its AI-driven technologies.

news.headline: Tom O’Brien retires from Driscoll’s after 30 years, leaving a legacy of innovation; pivotal figure in produce industry.
news.summary: In Watsonville, California, Driscoll’s has revealed the upcoming retirement of Tom O’Brien, the Senior Vice President of Global Human Resources & General Counsel. O’Brien, a prominent figure in the produce sector with over 30 years of experience, will be departing from his leadership position early next year. Throughout his tenure, he has been recognized for his innovative approaches, strong advocacy, and exceptional leadership qualities. O’Brien first engaged with Driscoll’s nearly 25 years ago, initially serving as the company’s attorney.

news.headline: Expedia introduces Flight Deals feature saving travelers 20% on fares, helping them find cheaper flights.
news.summary: Expedia, based in Seattle, has recently introduced Flight Deals, a new app feature aimed at assisting travelers in securing discounted airfares. This feature guarantees fares that are a minimum of 20% lower than the standard estimated price.

news.headline: Rubrik, Inc. (NYSE: RBRK) to report Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results on March 13, 2025. Conference call at 2:00 pm PT / 5:00 pm ET.
news.summary: Rubrik, Inc. (NYSE: RBRK), a cybersecurity firm based in Palo Alto, California, will be unveiling its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, which concluded on January 31, 2025. The results will be made public after the market closes on Thursday, March 13, 2025. Management is scheduled to conduct a live conference call on the same day at 2:00 pm PT / 5:00 pm ET to delve into the financial findings. Interested individuals can access a live webcast of the conference call and relevant materials via the Company’s investor relations platform.

news.headline: 8x8 launches Aftersale Assist to help retailers reduce returns, improve CX, and boost revenue growth.
news.summary: A technology company based in Campbell, California, known as 8x8, Inc., traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EGHT, unveiled a new product named 8x8 Aftersale Assist. This innovative solution is designed to help retailers enhance customer experience, decrease return rates, and boost revenue generation.

news.headline: ZenBusiness launches Real-Time Alerts and Compliance Score to simplify navigating state and federal regulations for small business owners.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ZenBusiness® has introduced new tools to help small business owners navigate compliance challenges. These tools include Worry-Free Compliance Alerts which assist in keeping track of federal and state-level requirements such as annual reports, amendments, and beneficial ownership disclosures. Small business owners often face difficulties in predicting and meeting these ever-changing regulations, but ZenBusiness® aims to simplify the process. With the launch of these new features, they are hoping to provide essential support as businesses strive to stay compliant.

news.headline: Spreetail's revenue surges by 34%, achieves $1B+ GMV in 2024. Demonstrates significant market share gains in oversized product category.
news.summary: Spreetail, a prominent ecommerce platform specializing in oversized products, has disclosed its exceptional performance for 2024. The company reported a remarkable 34% increase in Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) compared to the previous year. In addition to maintaining profitability, Spreetail made a substantial investment in its Brand Accelerator Engine. This growth far exceeded the industry average, with the overall ecommerce sector experiencing an 8.4% growth rate. Spreetail's success highlights its significant market share expansion in the lucrative $300 billion oversized product category.

news.headline: Pearl partners with Open Dental to integrate AI solutions for dental professionals, enabling software integration for better radiographic analysis nationwide.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Pearl, a prominent provider of dental AI solutions, has revealed a collaboration with Open Dental Software to incorporate its AI-driven tools into the Open Dental practice management system. This partnership allows for the integration of Pearl's Second Opinion® AI into Open Dental's Imaging Module, facilitating effortless AI-powered radiographic analysis for dental practitioners throughout the country. The Second Opinion® platform by Pearl stands out in the industry for its AI capabilities, offering real-time analysis to enhance diagnostic accuracy.

news.headline: Ethereum's price is at $2,656 (+2%) with potential for a rally; targets include $3,500 and $3,000. Staking ETFs may drive momentum.
news.summary: Ethereum (ETH) is currently trading at $2,656 with a 24-hour positive trend of 2%. Bitcoin (BTC) is priced at $95,900, showing a 1% increase, while XRP is at $2.45 with a 2.6% rise. The market is abuzz with speculation surrounding upcoming Ethereum staking ETFs, propelling ETH's momentum. Analysts like Inmortal predict a gradual upward movement for Ethereum without significant dips, with expectations of a substantial rally once ETH surpasses $3,500. Nebraskangooner suggests that if Ethereum's breakout holds, it could soon hit $3,000. Additionally, Michael van de Poppe has pointed out a bullish divergence on the ETH/BTC weekly chart, indicating potential strength ahead. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tickets for the 2025 Vera Bradley Annual Outlet Sale in Fort Wayne, Ind., (April 30 - May 4) now on sale.
news.summary: Tickets for the 2025 Vera Bradley Annual Outlet Sale are now on sale. The highly anticipated sale will take place from April 30 to May 4 in Fort Wayne, Indiana. This event attracts thousands of attendees looking to score deals on Vera Bradley products. If you're interested in attending, act quickly to secure your tickets for this popular sale.

news.headline: Fluence introduces Smartstack, offering 30% higher energy density and improved project economics.
news.summary: Leveraging Fluence’s top-notch project deployment skills, Smartstack provides increased intelligence and offers around a 30% boost in energy density in comparison to key competitors in the market. This results in improved project economics.

news.headline: NEXGEL CEO will present at Webull Consumer Virtual Webinar on Feb. 18, 2025. Company provides medical products.
news.summary: A company based in Langhorne, Pennsylvania, NEXGEL, Inc. ("NEXGEL") (NASDAQ: "NXGL"), known for its medical and over-the-counter products such as high-water-content hydrogels, shared that its CEO, Adam Levy, will be speaking on February 18, 2025, at the Webull Consumer Virtual Webinar. This firm is a top provider of ultra-gentle hydrogels used in healthcare and consumer settings. The date of this event is February 13, 2025.

news.headline: New DKNY campaign for Spring 2025 showcases Lila Moss in tribute to NYC movies.
news.summary: Five new cases of the coronavirus have been confirmed in the city, bringing the total number of cases to 37. The new cases include two women and three men, all of whom are currently isolating at home. This spike in cases has prompted local officials to issue a stay-at-home order for all residents in an effort to curb the spread of the virus. The order will be in place for the next two weeks. Additionally, health authorities are urging the public to practice social distancing, wear masks, and frequently wash their hands to protect themselves and others from the virus.
